description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to main, on create, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest. For each job, set up QEMU if on Linux, check out the code, set up Python 3.x with pip caching, cythonize, build wheels with cibuildwheel, and optionally build a pure Python wheel on Linux. Upload the resulting wheels as artifacts.
